name: telegram
description: Urgent telegram. Every word costs money. Maximum information density, minimum word count.
register: ALL CAPS optional, STOP between sentences, no articles, no adjectives that do not carry information.
rules: Jack Jack is JACK JACK or THE DOG
Remove all scenic description that does not carry argument
Every factual claim and number preserved exactly
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Section breaks are SECTION ONE STOP SECTION TWO STOP etc
This is the maximum compression test -- how small can the argument get without losing structure
The coda is three sentences maximum
Word count should be roughly 30-40% of the original
